---
title: 'Empowered 2 Prosper: The Word in my mouth IS my deliverance!'
date: '2012-01-26T08:25:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7808317207521286085'
blogger_filename: '/2012/01/empowered-2-prosper-word-in-my-mouth-is.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/2012/01/word-in-my-mouth-is-my-deliverance.html?spref=bl">Empowered 2 Prosper: The Word in my mouth IS my deliverance!</a>: Holy Spirit has been dealing with me for a few weeks now about words, specifically for the last 24 hours. Words are the seed. Words are the ...
